Summary: Production database connections dropping under load
Description: Applications throwing max connection pool errors during peak traffic windows.
Comment Body: Increased max_connections from 100 to 500 in postgresql.conf and optimized the connection pool timeout settings on the API gateway.

Summary: Intermittent packet loss between web server and API gateway
Description: Monitoring alerts show a 4% packet drop rate across core switches in subnet B.
Comment Body: Isolated a faulty SFP+ transceiver module on core switch SW-04. Replaced the fiber patch cable and verified error counters dropped to zero.

Summary: Staging environment application failing to load configurations
Description: Container startup failing with error: Missing environment variables for AWS Secrets Manager.
Comment Body: Corrected the missing IAM role assignment in the Terraform deployment script. Regenerated the container task definition to pull the correct variables.

Summary: Users encountering 500 Internal Server Error on login screen
Description: All authentication requests failing for users migrating from legacy accounts.
Comment Body: Patched the authentication service user-lookup query to handle null phone numbers safely. Verified integration tests pass against the production user table.
